description: Branded 'Case Spotlight' template graphic. The background is a dark blue, textured surface lit by a black tactical flashlight that hangs from the top of the frame on a lanyard, casting a cone of light downward toward the center. Centered over the beam is the title in large bold sans-serif caps: 'CASE' (white) above 'SPOTLIGHT' (golden-yellow). At the bottom is the DHS seal beside the white 'ICE' wordmark. The colors are blue and gold with deep shadows. This is a reusable template; here it accompanies a tweet about a U.S.-citizen suspect charged with child sexual exploitation investigated by HSI New England.
